name: Wyrmwood — Crooked Hut
description: North a crooked wooden hut leans between the trees, its frame warped as though grown rather than built. The forest presses close, but here the air feels... quieter.
ambient: The trees creak, but the hut does not answer.
Something about the silence here feels deliberate.

north.blocked_text: The door is closed. You need to open it first.

objects.name: hut door
objects.description: A warped wooden door, slightly ajar.

on_interact.open: You push the warped door open. It swings inward with a low groan.
on_interact.look: Old wood, swollen with damp. It has been opened many times.

objects.name: gravestone
objects.description: A weathered stone marker, half-swallowed by moss. The inscription is worn but you can just make out a name: 'Lyra'. A small hollow at the base looks like it was meant to hold an offering.

on_interact.look: The gravestone reads 'Lyra – Beloved and Lost'. The hollow at the base is empty.
on_interact.read: You trace the worn letters: 'Lyra – Beloved and Lost'.

interaction_rules.text: You gently place the flower into the hollow at the base of the gravestone. A faint shimmer runs through the stone, and a small needle wrapped in wasp silk materialises at your feet.
